item.title: Korea Hits Grand Slam, 4 Homers to Down Czechia in World Baseball Classic
item.description: Korea slugged four home runs to defeat Czechia in their respective World Baseball Classic opener.

item.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency: Prescribing Plan A and B for 9 QB-Needy Teams
item.description: As free agency and the draft near, nine teams have a huge question mark at quarterback. We have answers.

item.title: Best Sports Betting Apps 2026: Top Betting Sites Reviewed
item.description: Compare the best sports betting apps and sites for 2026. See reviews, bonuses, and features to help choose the right sportsbook for your needs.

item.title: Australia Opens World Baseball Classic With 3-0 Victory Over Chinese Taipei
item.description: Australia opened the World Baseball Classic in Tokyo by beating Chinese Taipei 3-0 on Robbie Perkins' two-run homer and Travis Bazzana's solo shot.

item.title: Who is Travis Bazzana? MLB Prospect And Australia Native Talks WBC (And Sushi)
item.description: MLB prospect Travis Bazanna dishes on Team Australia's World Baseball Classic goals and which food he misses from back home.
